name: truly
description: A local-first Chrome extension for improving reading clarity in social feeds and web pages.

scripts.test:unit:public: vitest run tests/unit/i18n.test.ts tests/unit/i18n-hardcoded-strings.test.ts tests/unit/model-display.test.ts tests/unit/model-source-config.test.ts tests/unit/provider-capabilities.test.ts tests/unit/reading-question-policy.test.ts tests/unit/theme-mode.test.ts
scripts.check:public: npm run check:public-boundary && npm run check:type && npm run test:contract:public && npm run test:unit:public && npm run build
scripts.check:build: npm run check:public-boundary && npm run build
